name: I B E W 26
description_short: IBEW Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering deposit accounts, loans, credit cards, and financial services primarily to IBEW union members and their families.
description_long:
IBEW Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving members of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) and their families. The institution is federally chartered and NCUA-insured, providing financial services rooted in the credit union cooperative model. The organization has maintained operations for decades with a focus on union member financial needs and community service. IBEW FCU operates multiple physical locations and provides digital banking channels to serve its membership base.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (savings, checking, money market, Christmas Club), share certificates with terms from 6 months to 5 years, and conductive share certificates allowing flexible deposits. Loan products span auto loans (new and used), recreational vehicle loans, mortgages (both in-house and third-party processed up to 30 years), home equity lines of credit, personal loans, and share-secured loans. Additional services include VISA credit cards, VISA debit cards, bill payment, remote deposit capture, online and mobile banking, wire transfers, cashier checks, money orders, and credit life/disability insurance options.

IBEW FCU distinguishes itself through union-specific membership and advocacy, offering payroll deduction services and dues payment options tailored to union members. The credit union provides in-house mortgage lending up to 12 years and access to nationwide branching through Credit Union Services Centers. They offer specialized insurance products including gap insurance with deductible assistance and accidental death/dismemberment coverage. The organization supports member financial education through its BALANCE Financial Fitness Program and provides audio/phone teller services for account management.

As a credit union, IBEW FCU operates on a not-for-profit basis returning earnings to members as dividend payments and competitive rates rather than shareholder profits. However, membership is restricted to IBEW union members and their families, limiting accessibility to the general public. The website provides limited transparency regarding current interest rates, loan APRs, and deposit dividend rates, requiring members to contact the institution directly for specific pricing. The organization serves a specialized member base rather than the broader consumer market.
services: Savings accounts, checking accounts (Draft Accounts), and money market accounts (Freedom Money Market Account)
Share certificates with 6-month to 5-year terms and conductive share certificates (24-month flexible deposits)
New and used auto loans, recreational vehicle loans, and gap insurance with deductible assistance
First mortgages (in-house up to 12 years and third-party processing up to 30 years), home equity lines of credit, and second mortgages
Personal loans, share-secured loans, overdraft loans, and loan payment calculator tools
VISA credit cards, VISA debit cards, and CU Money travel cards
Online and mobile banking, bill payment, remote deposit capture, and check image viewing
Wire transfers, money orders, cashier checks, and electronic funds transfer (EFT/ACH)
Credit life insurance, credit disability insurance, and accidental death/dismemberment insurance
Payroll deduction services and union dues payment processing
BALANCE Financial Fitness Program providing financial counseling and education
Notary services and audio/phone teller services
pros: Not-for-profit structure returns earnings to members as dividends and competitive rates rather than shareholder profits
Nationwide access through Credit Union Services Centers for branching and services beyond physical locations
Offers both in-house mortgages (up to 12 years) and longer-term third-party mortgage options (up to 30 years)
Comprehensive insurance products including gap insurance with deductible assistance and credit life/disability insurance
Specialized services for union members including payroll deductions and union dues payment processing
Full digital banking suite including mobile app, remote deposit capture, online bill payment, and e-statements
BALANCE Financial Fitness Program providing free financial education and counseling to members
cons: Membership restricted to IBEW union members and their immediate families, excluding general public access
Website lacks transparency on current interest rates, loan APRs, and dividend rates—requires direct contact
Limited information about loan qualification requirements, credit score minimums, or approval timelines
Physical branch locations appear limited, though nationwide service center access partially mitigates this
No readily available information about overdraft protection options or overdraft loan specifics on website
best_for: IBEW union members seeking competitive loan rates and member-owned financial institution benefits
Union electricians and families needing auto loans, mortgages, and comprehensive insurance protection
Members prioritizing not-for-profit banking with dividend returns and financial education support
IBEW members seeking payroll-deductible loan payments and dues collection services
diagnosis: IBEW Federal Credit Union is best for members of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers seeking not-for-profit banking with competitive rates, comprehensive loan products, and union-specific financial services. The primary caveat is that membership is restricted to IBEW union members and their families—the general public cannot open accounts—and the website provides limited transparency on current rates and terms, requiring direct member contact for pricing details.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: I B E W 26 — Credit Union in LANHAM, MD | CreditDoc
meta_description: I B E W 26 — NCUA-insured credit union in LANHAM, MD. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
